tasks.subject: Task 1: Readiness starts false, flips true after load
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `/ready` returns 503 until calibration data has actually loaded.

**Files:**
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/api/mod.rs:72` (initializer), `:46-48` (doc comment)
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/api/handlers.rs:1129-1131` (`test_app_state_readiness`)
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/api/routes.rs:~575` (`test_all_endpoints_present`)
- Modify: `antenna-model/tests/integration/helpers.rs:92-95`
- Test: `antenna-model/src/api/mod.rs` tests module (new `test_app_state_starts_not_ready`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] A freshly constructed `AppState` reports `is_ready() == false`
- [ ] `mark_ready()` / `mark_not_ready()` still round-trip
- [ ] `TestServer`-backed integration tests still see `/ready` -> 200
- [ ] `cargo test -p antenna-model` green

**Verify:** `cargo test -p antenna-model`

Full code for every step is in `docs/plan-s5-graceful-shutdown.md` -> Task 1.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/api/mod.rs", "antenna-model/src/api/handlers.rs", "antenna-model/src/api/routes.rs", "antenna-model/tests/integration/helpers.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model", "acceptanceCriteria": ["fresh AppState is_ready() == false", "mark_ready/mark_not_ready round-trip", "integration /ready still 200 via helpers mark_ready", "cargo test -p antenna-model green"], "modelTier": "mechanical", "planPath": "docs/plan-s5-graceful-shutdown.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Distinguish zero-enabled from all-failed load error
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The zero-calibrations error says *which* zero it is.

**Files:**
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/data/repository.rs:113-122` (and capture `enabled_count` after `:86`)
- Test: `antenna-model/src/data/repository.rs` tests module (two new tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Zero enabled antennas -> `Err` naming the empty-configuration case
- [ ] N enabled antennas that all fail -> `Err` reporting how many failed
- [ ] `Ok`/`Err` shape unchanged; existing `error_tests.rs` assertions stay green

**Verify:** `cargo test -p antenna-model --lib data::repository && cargo test -p antenna-model --test integration_tests error_`

Full code in `docs/plan-s5-graceful-shutdown.md` -> Task 2.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/data/repository.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model --lib data::repository && cargo test -p antenna-model --test integration_tests error_", "acceptanceCriteria": ["zero-enabled error message says 'No antennas enabled'", "all-failed error message reports the failed count", "Ok/Err shape unchanged; existing error_tests green"], "modelTier": "standard", "planPath": "docs/plan-s5-graceful-shutdown.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Honor fail_fast at startup; degraded state on /health and /status
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `fail_fast: true` + a failed load exits nonzero. `fail_fast: false` starts a server that says so: `/ready` 503, `/health` 200 `"degraded"`, `/status` reflects the empty set.

**Files:**
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/api/mod.rs:165-195` + new `LoadOutcome` enum and `initialize_repository()`
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/api/schemas.rs:984-991` (add `degraded()`)
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/api/handlers.rs:44-46` (`health` handler) + doc comment `:30-43`
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/api/routes.rs:482-493` (`test_health_route`)
- Test: `api/mod.rs` tests (3 new), `api/schemas.rs` tests (1 new)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] bad config + `fail_fast: true` -> `Err(io::Error)` whose message names `fail_fast`
- [ ] same config + `fail_fast: false` -> `Ok((empty_repo, LoadOutcome::Degraded))`
- [ ] fixture config -> `Ok((repo, LoadOutcome::Healthy))` with `antenna_count() > 0`
- [ ] `/health` is 200 with `status == "degraded"` on an empty repo, `"healthy"` otherwise; never non-200
- [ ] no new code in `main.rs`, no `process::exit` inside `api/`

**Verify:** `cargo test -p antenna-model`

Full code in `docs/plan-s5-graceful-shutdown.md` -> Task 3.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/api/mod.rs", "antenna-model/src/api/schemas.rs", "antenna-model/src/api/handlers.rs", "antenna-model/src/api/routes.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model", "acceptanceCriteria": ["initialize_repository + fail_fast=true returns Err naming fail_fast", "fail_fast=false returns Ok((empty, Degraded))", "fixture config returns Ok((repo, Healthy)) with antenna_count > 0", "/health is 200 with status degraded on empty repo, healthy otherwise", "no process::exit inside api/; main.rs unchanged"], "modelTier": "standard", "planPath": "docs/plan-s5-graceful-shutdown.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Real graceful shutdown - readiness flip, bounded drain, cleanup invoked
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A shutdown signal flips readiness false, waits for load balancers to notice, drains in-flight requests under a bounded timeout, then runs `shutdown_cleanup()`.

**Files:**
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/config/settings.rs` (two `ServerConfig` fields, `default_*` fns, `Default` impl `:238-247`, `from_file` `set_default`s)
- Modify: `antenna-model/src/api/mod.rs:230-241` + new `begin_shutdown`
- Modify: `config/service.yaml`
- Possibly: `antenna-model/Cargo.toml` (tokio `test-util` dev-feature for `start_paused`)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `shutdown_readiness_delay_secs` default 0, `shutdown_timeout_secs` default 25; both round-trip from YAML
- [ ] `begin_shutdown` flips readiness true -> false
- [ ] `begin_shutdown` with a nonzero delay actually waits (paused clock)
- [ ] `run_with_graceful_shutdown` gets `Some(drain_timeout)`, not `None`; `shutdown_cleanup(&state)` runs after it returns, including on the errored path
- [ ] `config/service.yaml` documents both knobs

**Verify:** `cargo test -p antenna-model`

CRITICAL: the readiness delay must be INSIDE the future passed to `run_with_graceful_shutdown` -- poem stops accepting connections the instant that future resolves.

Full code in `docs/plan-s5-graceful-shutdown.md` -> Task 4.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["antenna-model/src/config/settings.rs", "antenna-model/src/api/mod.rs", "antenna-model/Cargo.toml", "config/service.yaml"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p antenna-model", "acceptanceCriteria": ["shutdown_readiness_delay_secs default 0, shutdown_timeout_secs default 25", "both knobs round-trip from YAML", "begin_shutdown flips readiness false", "begin_shutdown waits the configured delay (paused clock)", "run_with_graceful_shutdown gets Some(drain_timeout), not None", "shutdown_cleanup called after the drain on both clean and errored paths", "config/service.yaml documents both knobs"], "modelTier": "standard", "planPath": "docs/plan-s5-graceful-shutdown.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Docs and spec - lifecycle section, /ready 503 schema drift
tasks.description:
**Goal:** `openapi.yaml` and `docs/api-documentation.md` describe the lifecycle the code now has, and the pre-existing `/ready` 503 schema drift is corrected.

**Files:**
- Modify: `openapi.yaml:49-83` (`/health`, `/ready`)
- Modify: `docs/api-documentation.md` (new Service Lifecycle section)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `/health` documents both `healthy` and `degraded`, and states it is always 200
- [ ] `/ready`'s 503 references `HealthResponse` (`{"status": "not_ready"}`), not `ErrorResponse`
- [ ] `api-documentation.md` documents readiness semantics, degraded state, shutdown sequence, `fail_fast`, and both new knobs
- [ ] Docs only -- no behavior change

**Verify:** `python3 -c "import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('openapi.yaml')); print('ok')"` -> `ok`

Full content in `docs/plan-s5-graceful-shutdown.md` -> Task 5.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["openapi.yaml", "docs/api-documentation.md"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -c \"import yaml; yaml.safe_load(open('openapi.yaml')); print('ok')\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["/health documents healthy and degraded, always 200", "/ready 503 references HealthResponse not ErrorResponse", "api-documentation.md has a Service Lifecycle section", "docs-only, no behavior change"], "modelTier": "mechanical", "planPath": "docs/plan-s5-graceful-shutdown.md"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Full gate, roadmap closeout, PR
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The workspace gate is green, S5 and Phase 2 are marked done in the roadmap, and the PR is open.

**Files:**
- Modify: `docs/roadmap-2026-07-work-units.md` (S5 entry ~line 899, Phase 2 header ~line 786)
- Modify: `docs/roadmap-2026-07.md` if it carries a phase-status line
- Add: `docs/plan-s5-graceful-shutdown.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `./scripts/check.sh` exits 0
- [ ] `concurrent_tests.rs`, `resilience_tests.rs`, `error_tests.rs` green
- [ ] Roadmap marks S5 done with the commit SHA, matching the S1-S4/S6 format
- [ ] Roadmap records Phase 2 closed (S1-S6 done; S7 superseded by C8)
- [ ] PR opened against `main`

**Verify:** `./scripts/check.sh` -> `All gate checks passed.`

Lead the PR body with the fail_fast behavior change. Full commands in `docs/plan-s5-graceful-shutdown.md` -> Task 6.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/roadmap-2026-07-work-units.md", "docs/roadmap-2026-07.md", "docs/plan-s5-graceful-shutdown.md"], "verifyCommand": "./scripts/check.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["scripts/check.sh exits 0", "concurrent_tests, resilience_tests, error_tests green", "roadmap marks S5 done with SHA", "roadmap records Phase 2 closed", "PR opened against main"], "modelTier": "standard", "planPath": "docs/plan-s5-graceful-shutdown.md"}
```
